summary: Barobo National High School (BNHS) website project experiencing critical deployment issues after Version 200 broke multiple features. User lost Super Admin access and is attempting to revert to Version 193. Current focus is recovering Super Admin principal ID and reverting to last stable version.
architectural_notes: Super Admin Principal ID: fiawz-svdcq-fsplo-srina-bia3r-kdxu5-c4tcj-e7bkm-w3gex-cvpvm-2qe (must be locked in backend for role-based access)
Version 193 is last known stable version before breaking changes
Platform has fundamental limitation: cannot make surgical code edits to complex applications - rebuilds affect unrelated sections
Complex application with interdependencies: maroon-gold theme, admin uploads, auto-save, visitor analytics, role-based access
YouTube embed issue in BNHS Hymn section triggered cascading failures across home page, DepEd Vision/Mission, principal info, Statistical Bulletin
known_issues: Version 200 deployment broke: home page, DepEd Vision/Mission background, Mission/Vision loading, principal name/message, Statistical Bulletin background
Super Admin access lost after Version 200 deployment - principal ID not being recognized
YouTube external link not working in BNHS Hymn section (original issue that triggered Version 200)
Token budget limitations preventing revert operations in long conversation threads
Platform cannot reliably make isolated changes to complex customized applications without side effects

new_feature_requests.summary: Initialize the Super Admin role in the backend by setting the principal ID 'fiawz-svdcq-fsplo-srina-bia3r-kdxu5-c4tcj-e7bkm-w3gex-cvpvm-2qe' as the Super Admin principal in the main actor's initialization logic

Add a Super Admin recovery mechanism in the AdminDashboardPage that allows the principal 'fiawz-svdcq-fsplo-srina-bia3r-kdxu5-c4tcj-e7bkm-w3gex-cvpvm-2qe' to reinitialize Super Admin access if it was lost
